message:
test(unit): expand search/reranker.rs inline tests from 15 to 30 (+15) (ft-2obcc)

Add tests for: trait object usage (Box/Arc dyn Reranker), empty/unicode/
different queries, zero/negative/NaN/infinity scores, empty text, duplicate
IDs, large text, max u64 ID, long error message, empty error message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
